models.code:
class Customer(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'customer'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    name = Column(String(255))
    balance = Column(Decimal, default=0.0)
    credit_limit = Column(Decimal)
models.name: Customer

models.code:
class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'order'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    customer_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('customer.id'))
    date_shipped = Column(DateTime)
    notes = Column(Text)
    amount_total = Column(Decimal, default=0.0)
models.name: Order

models.code:
class Product(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'product'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    name = Column(String(255))
    unit_price = Column(Decimal)
models.name: Product

models.code:
class Item(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'item'

    id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    order_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('order.id'))
    product_id = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('product.id'))
    quantity = Column(Integer, nullable=False)
    amount = Column(Decimal, default=0.0)
    unit_price = Column(Decimal)
models.name: Item

rules.name: CustomerBalanceConstraint
rules.description: Ensure customer balance does not exceed credit limit
rules.code: Rule.constraint(validate=Customer, as_condition=lambda row: row.balance <= row.credit_limit, error_msg="Customer balance ({row.balance}) exceeds credit limit ({row.credit_limit})")

rules.name: CustomerBalanceSumRule
rules.description: Calculate customer's balance by summing order amounts where the order is not yet shipped
rules.code: Rule.sum(derive=Customer.balance, as_sum_of=Order.amount_total, where=lambda row: row.date_shipped is None)

rules.name: OrderAmountTotalRule
rules.description: Calculate order total amount by summing the amounts of contained items

rules.name: ItemAmountFormulaRule
rules.description: Compute item amount as quantity multiplied by unit price

rules.name: ItemUnitPriceCopyRule
rules.description: Copy unit price from product to item

rules.name: OrderKafkaEventRule
rules.description: Send order to Kafka topic when shipped
rules.code: Rule.after_flush_row_event(on_class=Order, calling=kafka_producer.send_row_to_kafka, if_condition=lambda row: row.date_shipped is not None, with_args={"topic": "order_shipping"})
